{{Infobox character
| name = Tythalia
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Tythalia]] is an Ambassador of [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Tythalia]] is an Ambassador and a trusted member of Shyrax's royal court.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Tythalia]] is an aging, purple-skinned woman with violet hair.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
